channel.title: Earnings Call Strategic Briefings
channel.description: Weekly strategic briefings distilled from earnings call transcripts. Covers long-term strategy, culture, org structure, and competitive positioning — no quarterly noise.
channel.itunes:author: Arjun's Earnings Agent
channel.itunes:summary: Weekly strategic briefings distilled from earnings call transcripts. Covers long-term strategy, culture, org structure, and competitive positioning — no quarterly noise.

item.title: VEEV Q4 2026 Strategic Briefing
item.description: Veeva Systems Strategic Briefing. Fiscal Q4 2026 Earnings Call. Welcome to this strategic briefing on Veeva Systems. This is your deep dive into what's actually changing at this company, beyond the quarterly noise. We're covering the Vault CRM migration, their AI philosophy, how they think about trust and culture, the evolving product portfolio, and where this company is headed over the next decade. Let's start with the biggest strategic story at Veeva right now: the Vault CRM migration away f...

item.title: VEEV Deep Dive — Five Banks, Four Years
item.description: Veeva Systems: The Pharma Software Fortress. A comprehensive deep dive synthesizing equity research from Cowen (Dec 2022), JPMorgan (Oct 2022 and Sep 2025), BNP Paribas (Oct 2024), BMO Capital Markets (Nov 2025), and UBS (Feb 2026). Covers the full business model, the Vault CRM migration, the Salesforce and IQVIA competitive battles, the AI debate, management philosophy, the financial compounding story, and how Wall Street's view evolved across four years.

item.title: AAPL Q1 2026 Podcast
item.description: Apple Earnings Breakdown — Q1 Fiscal 2026 A Two-Host Deep Dive HOSTS: ALEX and MORGAN --- [INTRO] ALEX: Welcome back. I'm Alex. MORGAN: And I'm Morgan. Today we're breaking down Apple's fiscal first quarter of 2026 — the quarter ending December 2025. And Apple, just… had a moment. ALEX: They really did. Tim Cook opened the call with this: "I am proud to say that we just had a quarter for the record books." MORGAN: That's not standard CEO boilerplate. "Quarter for the record books." And th...
